<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Uid; class MaxUuid extends Uuid { protected const TYPE = -1; public function __construct() { $this->uid = parent::MAX; } }
